expectations.text: A new file us###.md was created under <sandbox>/main/docs/notes/ (the main worktree's AKM dir)
expectations.evidence: main-tree.txt has only seeded us001-us014; no us015 in main

expectations.text: NO new us*.md was created under <sandbox>/feat/docs/notes/ (the feature worktree's tree is untouched)
expectations.evidence: feat-tree.txt shows /tmp/sw-iter6-old/feat/docs/notes/us015.md — leak into feature worktree

expectations.text: Filename slug matches us<NNN>.md with three-digit zero-padded id and is us015 or higher (does not collide with seeded ids us001-us014)
The new file is staged in the main worktree's git index (git -C <sandbox>/main status --porcelain shows the file as 'A ' or 'AM ')
expectations.evidence: main-status.txt is empty — main is clean; nothing was staged on main

expectations.text: No commit was created on main for this story
expectations.evidence: main-log.txt has only seed commit — but vacuously, since nothing was written to main

expectations.text: ## role section contains [[pn001|requestor]] referencing the existing seeded persona
## acceptance_criteria has exactly 3 bullets matching the user's input
Skill confirmation surfaces the absolute AKM path so the user sees the write landed in <sandbox>/main, not <sandbox>/feat
expectations.evidence: response.md reports docs/notes/us015.md path relative to cwd (feat worktree); no AKM root concept in old skill
